name: Gigi Gibilisco
shortBio: Returns to the stage with Midnight Productions and currently serves as Assistant Music Director at Notre Dame High School.
fullBio: Gigi Gibilisco is excited to return to the stage with Midnight Productions...

name: Jamey Helsman
shortBio: A longtime Midnight Productions performer whose history with this show stretches back decades.
fullBio: Jamey Helsman first auditioned for Midnight Productions' Jesus Christ Superstar in 1994...

name: Katrina Pilchman
shortBio: Reprises Mary Magdalene with Midnight Productions and brings both stage and classical performance experience.
fullBio: Katrina Pilchman is excited and honored to be reprising her role as Mary Magdalene...
